title: Define agent outcome evaluation loop
goal: Define measurement for whether RepoBrief actually improves agent code handling: localization, evidence completeness, patch scope, evaluation fit and miss taxonomy.

acceptance.assertion: Evaluation distinguishes localization, evidence completeness, patch scope, check fit and miss taxonomy.
Agent-written tests or passing checks are not treated as independent correctness proof.
Patch Evaluation/CI results are consumed as external observations with mandatory non-claims.

metadata.outcome: Defined Agent Outcome Evaluation Loop for RepoBrief-assisted code work.

verified_acceptance.rbae-v1-t006-metrics: Evaluation axes, required metrics and miss taxonomy distinguish localization, evidence completeness, patch scope, check fit and misses.
verified_acceptance.rbae-v1-t006-no-self-proof: No self-proof rule forbids treating agent-authored tests or local green checks as independent correctness proof.
verified_acceptance.rbae-v1-t006-sidecar-link: External observations section consumes Patch Evaluation, CI, review and operator evidence with mandatory non-claims.
